scripts.build: bun run build:packages && bun run --cwd apps/site build && bun run --cwd apps/cloudflare typecheck && tsc -p examples/tsconfig.json
scripts.build:packages: bun run --cwd packages/core build && bun run --cwd packages/local build && bun run --cwd packages/ai build && bun run --cwd packages/vercel build && bun run --cwd packages/e2b build && bun run --cwd packages/daytona build && bun run --cwd packages/cloudflare build && bun run --cwd packages/modal build && bun run --cwd packages/blaxel build && bun run --cwd packages/codesandbox build
scripts.docs:api: bun run build:packages && bun scripts/api.ts && bun x oxfmt docs/api.md
scripts.docs:api:check: bun run docs:api && git diff --exit-code docs/api.md
scripts.pack:packages: for p in packages/core packages/local packages/ai packages/vercel packages/e2b packages/daytona packages/cloudflare packages/modal packages/blaxel packages/codesandbox; do (cd $p && bun pm pack --dry-run); done
scripts.test: bun run build:packages && bun test packages test
scripts.verify:providers: bun run build:packages && bun --env-file=.env.local test --timeout=300000 packages/blaxel/test/live.test.ts packages/cloudflare/test/live.test.ts packages/codesandbox/test/live.test.ts packages/daytona/test/live.test.ts packages/e2b/test/live.test.ts packages/modal/test/live.test.ts packages/vercel/test/live.test.ts
scripts.verify:blaxel: bun run --cwd packages/blaxel build && bun --env-file=.env.local test --timeout=300000 packages/blaxel/test/live.test.ts
scripts.verify:cloudflare: bun run --cwd packages/cloudflare build && bun --env-file=.env.local test --timeout=300000 packages/cloudflare/test/live.test.ts
scripts.verify:codesandbox: bun run --cwd packages/codesandbox build && bun --env-file=.env.local test --timeout=300000 packages/codesandbox/test/live.test.ts
scripts.verify:daytona: bun run --cwd packages/daytona build && bun --env-file=.env.local test --timeout=300000 packages/daytona/test/live.test.ts
scripts.verify:e2b: bun run --cwd packages/e2b build && bun --env-file=.env.local test --timeout=300000 packages/e2b/test/live.test.ts
scripts.verify:modal: bun run --cwd packages/modal build && bun --env-file=.env.local test --timeout=300000 packages/modal/test/live.test.ts
scripts.verify:vercel: bun run --cwd packages/vercel build && bun --env-file=.env.local test --timeout=300000 packages/vercel/test/live.test.ts
scripts.typecheck: bun run build:packages && bun run --cwd apps/site typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/cloudflare typecheck && tsc -p examples/tsconfig.json
